message:
feat(pt-common): Add command/CWD categorization output with hashing (cfon.3)

Implements deterministic mapping from raw command line + working directory
to category features used by priors and inference:

- Add CategorizationOutput struct with:
  - cmd_category (g): test/devserver/agent/build/editor/server/daemon/...
  - cwd_category: project/temp/system/home/appdata/runtime/root/unknown
  - cmd_signature: SHA-256 hash of normalized command tokens
  - cmd_short: display-safe short form for TUI/agent views

- Add CategoryMatcher::categorize() method returning full output
- Add normalize_command_tokens() for stable signature generation
- Add compute_short_form() for display-safe command representation

Signature normalization:
- Extracts base executable (strips path)
- Includes category for disambiguation
- Preserves flag names only (strips values)
- Sorts and deduplicates for stability

13 new tests covering:
- Full categorization output
- Signature stability and uniqueness
- Short form display formatting
- Token normalization
- Serialization roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
